message:
fix(packages): reject empty package source in settings update

Add early validation in update_package_sources() that trims the source
string and rejects empty/whitespace-only values with
Error::Config("settings package source cannot be empty").

New test update_package_sources_rejects_empty_source verifies the
rejection and confirms failed update does not mutate settings file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
